item.title: devops
item.description: Devops Post Linux 1 - Foundation Linux 2 - Terminal Linux Zsh... 3 - Docker - Docker Compose 4 - WebServer Nginx

item.title: golang
item.description: Golang Overview Go language was developed in the year 2007 by Robert Griesemer, Rob Pike, and Ken Thompson at Google and publicly announced in 2009. It was officially released in 2012 as an open-source programming language. Foundation 1 - Foundation 2 - Syntax - Naming Convention Uber 3 - HTTP - API 4 - GRPC 5 - GRPC Gateway 6 - Tutorial Build a Project

item.title: Chapter I: golang
item.description: Install Golang Windows Go to website and download the latest Golang version: https://go.dev/doc/install Install Setting GOPATH Environment Environmental Variables under Control Panel > System and Security > System > Advanced Settings > Environmental Variables Syntax Each Statement ends with a line break. To comment block code 1/* 2This is block comment in go 3*/ Comment line 1// This is single line comment Variable 1var variable-name datatype = value Condition 1if(condition) { 2 //code block to be executed when if condition evaluates to true 3} Switch Case
